patch_description: Replace the hub-to-center entanglement gates from CRZ to CRX and switch the hub-edge parameter to a shared one. Update the ANSATZ_SPEC docstring to reflect the new shared-parameter hub pattern. This increases expressivity by using a different two-qubit axis at the hub while keeping parameter count stable, which can improve validation/generalization without exploding the parameter budget.

```
# Layer 4: Hub entanglement (center to edges with parametrized gates)

    spec.append({"gate": "CRZ", "wires": [8, 3], "param": "crz_hub_edge"})
    spec.append({"gate": "CRZ", "wires": [8, 5], "param": "crz_hub_edge"})
    spec.append({"gate": "CRZ", "wires": [8, 7], "param": "crz_hub_edge"})
```

```diff
+      spec.append({"gate": "CRX", "wires": [8, 5], "param": "crx_hub_edge_3"})

```
